title: fix(dashboard): read githubUsername from D1 profile endpoint
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Fresh name tags
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky bug where your dashboard would sometimes show an old GitHub username. Your profile now stays perfectly in sync with reality.
gist.summary: Updated the dashboard to fetch the user's GitHub username directly from the database instead of relying on a cached session.
gist.impact: Users will now always see their most up-to-date GitHub username on the dashboard immediately after logging in or syncing.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) holding a freshly printed name tag or ID badge. The robot companion is printing it out from a retro terminal, symbolizing the fresh data fetch.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a freshly printed name tag, while a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head prints it from a retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a freshly printed name tag, while a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head prints it from a retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
